problem id: b14f7be3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00111110 -> 11111111
  11001100 -> 10100110
  01110111 -> 01001011
  00010111 -> 01111011
  11111011 -> 11001101
  11000100 -> 00100010
  01110101 -> 01101010
  11011011 -> 11011101
  00000000 -> 00000000

query: 11111100
predicted answer: 10111110
